---
format:
  html: {toc: true, toc-depth: 4, theme: quarto}
title: Stats with Clojure
author: Scicloj Team

---
<style></style><style>.printedClojure .sourceCode {
  background-color: transparent;
  border-style: none;
}
</style><style>.clay-limit-image-width .clay-image {max-width: 100%}
.clay-side-by-side .sourceCode {margin: 0}
.clay-side-by-side {margin: 1em 0}
</style>
<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.6.0.min.js" type="text/javascript"></script><script src="https://code.jquery.com/ui/1.13.1/jquery-ui.min.js" type="text/javascript"></script>

::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(ns median)
```
:::


for odd number of elements


::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(def numbers [1 2 3])
```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
numbers
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
[1 2 3]

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(nth numbers (/ (count numbers) 2))
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
2

```
:::


for even number of elements


::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(def numbers [1 2 3 4])
```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
numbers
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
[1 2 3 4]

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(count numbers)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
4

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(/ (count numbers) 2)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
2

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(nth numbers (/ (count numbers) 2))
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
3

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(dec (/ (count numbers) 2))
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
1

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(nth numbers (dec (/ (count numbers) 2)))
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
2

```
:::


median


::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(defn median [numbers]
  (let [n (count numbers)
        sorted-numbers (sort numbers)]
    (if (odd? n)
      (nth sorted-numbers (/ n 2))
      (let [mid1 (nth sorted-numbers (/ n 2))
            mid2 (nth sorted-numbers (dec (/ n 2)))]
        (float (/ (+ mid1 mid2) 2))))))
```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(median [1 2 3])
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
2

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(median [1 2 3 4])
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
2.5

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(median [2 1 3])
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
2

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(median [2 1 4 3])
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
2.5

```
:::



```{=html}
<div style="background-color:grey;height:2px;width:100%;"></div>
```



```{=html}
<div><pre><small><small>source: <a href="https://github.com/scicloj/stats_with_clojure/blob/main/notebooks/median.clj">notebooks/median.clj</a></small></small></pre></div>
```
